task_completion.visual_evidence: In the EventLog Analyzer rule creation or edit form, the Rule Name field contains exactly 'Critical_Response_Auto'.

task_completion.description: Rule condition is set to 'Critical' severity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the rule criteria or conditions section, 'Severity' is selected and set to 'Critical'.
In the rule action or assignment section, the user 'admin' is selected as the assignee.

task_completion.description: The new incident assignment rule is saved and visible in the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A list or table of Incident Assignment Rules showing 'Critical_Response_Auto' as a saved/active rule.

task_completion.description: The audit report documenting the configuration change is accessed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ManageEngine EventLog Analyzer interface showing an Audit Report, System Log, or User Activity page that logs system configuration changes.

task_completion.description: The audit report is exported to /home/ga/audit_evidence.csv.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file manager, or terminal window confirming the report was saved or moved to exactly '/home/ga/audit_evidence.csv' in CSV format.

integrity.description: Agent used the EventLog Analyzer GUI to configure the rule.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web interface for EventLog Analyzer, not just terminal curl commands or direct database modifications.

integrity.description: The audit report was genuinely exported from the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent using the 'Export' or 'Save as CSV' functionality within the EventLog Analyzer interface, rather than manually typing out a CSV file in a text editor.

integrity.description: The evidence file was not faked via terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal commands like 'echo' or 'nano' were used to manually write fake audit logs directly into /home/ga/audit_evidence.csv.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The incident assignment rule must be named exactly 'Critical_Response_Auto'. The assignee must be 'admin' (the default administrator). The severity condition must be 'Critical'. The final audit report must be exported as a CSV file to exactly '/home/ga/audit_evidence.csv'.
